blocks.text: was still standing at the door when he paused. She didn't move until he went inside.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Cold. Still nice to look at.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: You come out here often? In the morning?

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Nothing specific. Just — you ever feel like you're carrying something and you're not sure when you picked it up?

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: It's a good morning. The light out here is different before everyone else wakes up.
He changed the subject fast. Not nervous — practiced.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: How long have you known Nadia?

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Since sophomore year. She tutored me through organic chemistry. I would not have survived without her.

options.label: "She seems like someone who pays close attention to things."
